title: Usage Metering Event (Contract 19.1)
description: Common metering payload emitted by every SharedCore service as the body of a cypherx.<service>.usage.recorded Kafka event (Contract 5 envelope wraps it). One event per billable operation; metering events are NEVER sampled (loss = revenue loss) and MUST be produced via the transactional outbox pattern. Forward-compatible: unknown fields are tolerated (additionalProperties: true); only tenant_id, operation and units are validation-mandatory.

tenant_id.description: The isolation boundary that consumed the billable operation (Contract 13). Resolved from the JWT, never from a request body.

api_key_id.description: The API key that authenticated the operation (Contract 18), or null when not key-authenticated.

agent_id.description: The agent that performed the operation, or null for non-agent callers.

principal_id.description: The principal (human/service user) for non-agent callers, or null when an agent_id is present.

publisher_tenant_id.description: For tool/skill marketplace revenue-share: the tenant that published the consumed tool/skill. Null when not a marketplace operation.

units.description: Map of unit_type -> numeric quantity consumed (e.g. {"prompt_tokens": 1200, "completion_tokens": 340}). Unit types are service-defined. Must contain at least one entry; every value is a number.

cost_usd.description: Computed monetary cost of the operation in USD.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the metered operation in milliseconds.

request_id.description: Correlates this metering event to the originating API request.
